meaning: n.公元前 5 世纪的希伯来领导人,尼希米记
examples: The words of Nehemiah the son of Hachaliah.
Nehemiah was not a preacher, he was a career man.
The book of Nehemiah is about the change God brought to his people.
Nehemiah Griego, 15, will stand trial as an adult in the weekend killings, prosecutors announced.
Nehemiah Odhiambo was Kenyan's top scorer on 66 followed by Odoyo's match-winning knock.
